hooks.command: printf '%s\n' 'Apply $groundcraft to substantial delegated work. Stay within inherited scope and authority, use domain skills for procedure, and return a distilled result with evidence pointers and uncertainty.'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output 'Apply $groundcraft to substantial delegated work. Stay within inherited scope and authority, use domain skills for procedure, and return a distilled result with evidence pointers and uncertainty.'"
